description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that builds and deploys a .NET Core application to an Azure Web App named AntDesignDocsWebApp. The workflow should trigger on push to the master branch and run only for the repository owner 'ant-design-blazor'. It should set up multiple .NET Core versions, Node.js 16.x, restore, build, test, and publish the application, then deploy it to Azure Web App using a publish profile from secrets.
